name: Gemma 2B
note: Smallest first-gen open Gemma; runs on modest/consumer hardware; superseded by Gemma 2/3/4 generations.
tpsNote: No verified RTX 4090 llama.cpp Q4 throughput number found for the original (Gemma 1) 2B checkpoint.
verificationNotes: Confirmed real: released 2024-02-21 per Hugging Face blog and Google blog (multiple independent sources agree). Directly fetched huggingface.co/google/gemma-2b model card: all five benchmark rows (MMLU 42.3, HellaSwag 71.4, ARC-c 42.1, HumanEval 22.0, GSM8K 17.7) appear verbatim in its evaluation table -- all confirmed exactly as claimed. Params corrected/confirmed at the source level: fetched arXiv 2403.08295v4 Table 2 directly, which gives an exact parameter count of 2,506,434,560 (524.5M embedding + 1.98B non-embedding) = 2.5B, matching paramsB despite the '2B' marketing name -- this is a genuine, well-documented quirk (Gemma 2B/7B names refer to rounded marketing tiers, not exact counts).
